uploadwizard-desc: Saaxirka Soo Gelinta, qalab fudud oo lagu soo geliyo warbaahinta badan
tag-uploadwizard-description: Soo gelinno lagu sameeyay Saaxirka Soo gelinta
tag-uploadwizard-flickr-description: Soo gelinno Flickr ah oo lagu sameeyay Saaxirka Soo gelinta
right-mass-upload: Hal mar ku soo geli faylal badan adigoo adeegsanaya Saaxirka Soo gelinta
action-mass-upload: hal mar ku soo geli faylal badan adigoo adeegsanaya Saaxirka Soo gelinta
api-error-parsererror: Seerfarku wuxuu soo celiyay dukumenti JSON aan sax ahayn. Tani waxay noqon kartaa dhibaato ka jirta API-ga, ama waxaad adeegsanaysaa seerfar wakiil oo kaa hor istaagaya inaad faylal soo geliso.
api-error-noimageinfo: Soo gelintu way guulaysatay, laakiin serfarku nama siin wax macluumaad ah oo ku saabsan faylka.
mwe-upwiz-unavailable: Bsraawsarkaaga lama jaanqaadi karo UploadWizard ama JavaScript ayaa dansan, sidaas darteed waxaan ku tusaynaa foom fudud oo lagu soo geliyo faylasha. ([https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/UploadWizard#Compatibility Eeg shuruudaha iswa])
mwe-upwiz-extension-disabled: Boggan waa la naafoyeeyay sababo la xiriira dhibaatooyin farsamo oo ku meel gaar ah. Inta ka horreysa, isku day foomka caadiga ah ee soo gelinta.
mwe-upwiz-campaign-unknown-error: Khalad aan la garanayn ayaa dhacay.
mwe-upwiz-api-warning-exists: Waxaa jira [$1 fayl kale] oo hore ugu yaal wiki-ga oo leh isla magaca faylka
mwe-upwiz-api-warning-was-deleted: Waxaa jiray fayl leh magacan "$1", balse waa la tirtiray mana dib loo soo gelin karo. Haddii faylkaagu ka duwan yahay, isku day inaad magac kale u bixiso.
mwe-upwiz-tutorial-error-localized-file-: Raalli ahow, ma aanan helin cashar ku qoran luqaddaada. Sidaas darteed, waxaa lagu tusayaa kan $1.
mwe-upwiz-tutorial-error-file-missing: Naga raali noqo, waa weynay wax fayl ah oo ku aadan daadihinta la rabay in ee meeshaan ku qornaato. Fadlan la hadal maamulaha combiyutarka.
mwe-upwiz-tutorial-error-cannot-transfor: Raalli ahow, ma aanan heli karin sawir la cabbiray oo casharka ku habboon shaashaddan. Tani waxay noqon kartaa dhibaato ku meel gaar ah oo ku saabsan Wikimedia Commons; fadlan mar kale isku day dambe.
mwe-upwiz-add-file-0-free: Dooro faylka wararka si aad u tabarucdid
mwe-upwiz-add-file-flickr-n: Ku dar sawirro dheeraad ah oo Flickr ah
mwe-upwiz-flickr-disclaimer1: Foomkan wuxuu soo gelin doonaa waxyaabo lagu martigeliyay flickr.com, waxaana ay hoos imanayaan Flickr [https://www.flickr.com/help/terms/ shuruudaha isticmaalka] iyo [https://www.flickr.com/help/privacy-policy/ siyaasadda asturnaanta].
mwe-upwiz-flickr-disclaimer2: Fadlan ogow in adigoo adeegsanaya qalabkan, cinwaankaaga IP-ga iyo faahfaahinta codsigaaga ay heli doonaan Flickr.
mwe-upwiz-error-no-image-retrieved: Waan awoodi weynay inaan ka soo helno faylka $1.
mwe-upwiz-multi-file-select2: Dooro faylasha aad rabto inaad soo geliso. Qabo furaha Shift oo guji si aad hal mar u doorato faylal badan. Waxaad dooran kartaa ilaa $1 {{PLURAL:$1|fayl|faylal}} si aad u soo geliso.
mwe-upwiz-getting-metadata: Helitaanka macluumaadka faylka iyo muuqaalada horudhaca…
mwe-upwiz-remove-upload: Ka saar faylkan liiska faylasha la soo gelinayo
mwe-upwiz-file-some-failed: Qaar ka mid ah soo gelinnadu way fashilmeen.
mwe-upwiz-file-retry: Isku day mar kale soo gelinnadii fashilmay
mwe-upwiz-file-all-failed: Ma jiro wax soo gelin ah oo guuleystay.
mwe-upwiz-upload-count: $1 ka mid ah $2 {{PLURAL:$2|fayl|faylal}} ayaa la soo geliyay
mwe-upwiz-deeds-intro: Dhammaan warbaahinta lagu soo geliyo {{SITENAME}} waa kuwo qof kasta si xor ah u isticmaali karo uguna wadaagi karo internetka ama ka baxsan internetka. Si loo hubiyo in {{PLURAL:$1|shaqada|shaqooyinka}} aad soo gelinayso {{PLURAL:$1|ay tahay|ay yihiin}} kuwo aan lahayn xuquuq daabacaad, fadlan bixi macluumaadka soo socda.
mwe-upwiz-source-ownwork-label: {{PLURAL:$1|Shaqadan waxaa sameeyay aniga|Shaqooyinkan waxaa sameeyay aniga}} qof kasta waa u xor inuu {{PLURAL:$1|isticmaal|isticmaalo}}.
mwe-upwiz-source-ownwork-cc-by-sa-4.0-ex: (waxay ka rabtaa qofka isticmaalaya {{PLURAL:$1|warbaahintan|warbaahinnadan}} inuu bixiyo tixraac ku habboon isla markaana uu ku faafiyo shati la mid ah)

mwe-upwiz-source-ownwork-cc-by-3.0-expla: (waxay ka rabtaa qofka isticmaalaya {{PLURAL:$1|warbaahintan|warbaahinnadan}} inuu bixiyo tixraac ku habboon)
mwe-upwiz-source-ownwork-cc-zero-explain: (dhammaan xuquuqaha, qof kasta waa u xor inuu {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}} u isticmaalo si kasta oo uu rabo)
mwe-upwiz-source-ownwork-generic-explain: ({{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan waa|shaqooyinkan waa}} la aqbali karaa in lagu soo geliyo wiki-kan)
mwe-upwiz-source-ownwork-question: Ruqsad noocee ayaad rabtaa inaad ku daabacdo {{GENDER:$2|shaqadan}} {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}}? Dhammaan warbaahinta Commons waa in lagu daabaco shati xor ah.
mwe-upwiz-source-ownwork-purpose-label: Fadlan dooro ikhtiyaarka ugu habboon ee sharxaya ujeeddada {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}}.
mwe-upwiz-source-ownwork-purpose-option-: {{PLURAL:$1|Shaqadan waxay bixisaa|Shaqooyinkani waxay bixiyaan}} aqoon, tilmaamo, ama macluumaad loo gudbiyo dadka kale.
{{PLURAL:$1|Shaqadan waa|Shaqooyinkan waa}} loogu talagalay isticmaalkeyga gaarka ah, tusaale ahaan sawirrada aniga, qoyskeyga ama saaxiibbaday, ama waxyaabo is xayeysiin ah.
mwe-upwiz-source-ownwork-origin-option-o: {{PLURAL:$1|Shaqadan si buuxda ayaan aniga u abuuray|Shaqooyinkan si buuxda ayaan aniga u abuuray}}
{{PLURAL:$1|Shaqadan waxaa ku jira|Shaqooyinkan waxaa ku jira}} shaqo dadka kale leeyihiin
Ma shaqada dadka kale ee ku jirta {{PLURAL:$1|warbaahintan|warbaahinnadan}} ma xor baa in la isticmaalo lana wadaago?
Haa, {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}} lama ilaalinayo sharciyada xuquuqda daabacaadda
Maya, {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}} waa kuwo ay xuquuqda daabacaad ilaaliso
Ma garanayo in {{PLURAL:$1|uu yahay|ay yihiin}} xor loo isticmaali karo lana wadaagi karo
mwe-upwiz-source-ownwork-origin-option-a: Geli magaca mashiinka sirdoonka macmalka ah ee la adeegsaday. Haddii shaqo asal ah oo qof kale leeyahay la adeegsaday si loo abuuro {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}}, ku dar iyagana.
Tusaale: Qoraa: Midjourney AI; Sawir qaade: Ansel Adams; midabayn lagu sameeyay Colorme AI, iwm.
Geli tilmaamaha la adeegsaday si loo soo saaro warbaahintan
mwe-upwiz-source-permission: Qoraagoodu wuxuu si cad kuu siiyay oggolaansho aad ku soo geliso iyaga
mwe-upwiz-source-thirdparty-label: {{PLURAL:$1|Shaqadan waxaa sameeyay qof kale|Shaqooyinkan waxaa sameeyay dad kale}} waxaana {{PLURAL:$1|uu yahay|ay yihiin}} kuwo xor loo wadaagi karo.
mwe-upwiz-source-thirdparty-intro: fadlan ku qor ciwaanka aa ka soo heshay fayl kasto
mwe-upwiz-source-thirdparty-custom-multi: Haddii dhammaan faylasha ay leeyihiin isla isha, qoraaga, iyo xaaladda xuquuqda daabacaadda, hal mar kaliya ayaad u geli kartaa dhammaantood.
mwe-upwiz-source-thirdparty-explain: Waxaad soo gelin kartaa shaqo qof kale leeyahay haddii ay ku daabacan tahay shati xor ah ama xuquuqdeedu ay dhammaatay.
mwe-upwiz-source-thirdparty-cases-title: Fadlan dooro sababta {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}} ay xor u yihiin in la wadaago. Bixinta macluumaad khaldan waxay keeni kartaa in warbaahintaada la tirtiro.
mwe-upwiz-source-multiple-label-individu: Bixi macluumaad gaar ah oo ku saabsan fayl kasta oo si gooni ah u yaal
mwe-upwiz-patent-dialog-text-warranty: Waxaan dammaanad qaadayaa in isticmaalka {{PLURAL:$1|faylkan|faylashan}} iyo wax kasta oo ku sawiran {{PLURAL:$1|faylka|faylasha}} uusan si ogaal ah ama si taxaddar la’aan ah ugu xadgudbi doonin shatiyada.
mwe-upwiz-patent-dialog-text-license: Waxaan abuuray {{PLURAL:$1|naqshadda|naqshadaha}} aasaasiga ah ee 3D  {{PLURAL:$1|shayga|shayada}} ee la muujiyay.
mwe-upwiz-patent-dialog-text-license-gra: Waxaan siinayaa ruqsad shaati oo joogto ah dhammaan dadka isticmaala {{PLURAL:$1|faylkan|faylashan}} iyo walxaha 3D ee la xiriira.
mwe-upwiz-patent-weapon-policy: Isticmaalayaashu waa inay ka fogaadaan in ay soo geliyaan wax kasta oo 3D ah oo loo arki karo hub ama "shay difaac". Bulshada Commons waxay ka saari kartaa waxyaabaha noocaas ah marka la baaro.
mwe-upwiz-license-metadata-title-v2: Shatiga CC-0 ayaa lagu dabaqi doonaa qoraallada hoos ku qoran iyo macluumaad dheeraad ah sida mawduucyada ugu muhiimsan iyo goobta (MA AHA faylka)
mwe-upwiz-license-metadata-content: Adigoo riixaya "daabac", waxaad oggolaanaysaa [[wmf:Terms_of_Use|shuruudaha isticmaalka]], sidoo kalena si aan dib looga noqon karin waxaad oggolaanaysaa inaad ka sii dayso wax ku biirintaada shatiga [https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/ Creative Commons CC0 License].
mwe-upwiz-copy-metadata-text: Nuqul ka samee macluumaadka si loogu isticmaalo gelinta kale
mwe-upwiz-copy-metadata-subtitle: Dooro macluumaadka aad rabto inaad nuqul uga sameyso gelinta kale:
mwe-upwiz-copy-metadata-button-text: Nuqul ka samee xulashooyinka si loogu isticmaalo gelinta kale
mwe-upwiz-copy-title-label: Cinwaan (lambarayn otomaatig ah ayaa lagu dari doonaa si cinwaanka uu u noqdo mid gaar ah)
mwe-upwiz-caption-add: {{PLURAL:$1|0=Ku dar qoraal hoosaad|Ku dar qoraal hoosaad luqad kale}}
mwe-upwiz-desc-add: {{PLURAL:$1|0=Ku dar sharaxaad|Ku dar sharaxaad luuqad kale}}
mwe-upwiz-objref-notice-existing-image: Sawir hore ayuu u jiraa shayga la tixraacay.
mwe-upwiz-objref-notice-update-delay: Cusboonaysiinta bogga la tixraacay waxay qaadan kartaa waqti.
mwe-upwiz-author-text: Geli magaca qoraaga asalka ah ee {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}}.
mwe-upwiz-author-text-ai: Geli magaca mashiinka sirdoonka macmalka ah ee la adeegsaday, kadibna geli magaca qofka sameeyay tilmaamaha:
mwe-upwiz-author-text-ai-help: Tusaale: Qoraa: Midjourney AI; waxaa tilmaamaha sameeyay Jane Doe
mwe-upwiz-autoconverted: Faylkan si otomaatig ah ayaa loogu beddelay qaabka $1
mwe-upwiz-other-v2: Macluumaad kale oo {{GENDER:$1|aad}} rabto inaad ku darto
mwe-upwiz-source-text: Halkee ayaad {{GENDER:$2|ka heshay}} {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}}? Geli website-ka, buugga, ama ilo kale.
mwe-upwiz-source-ai: {{PLURAL:$1|Shaqadan waxaa lagu soo saaray|Shaqooyinkan waxaa lagu soo saaray}} qalab sirdoon macmal ah
mwe-upwiz-thanks-message: Waad ku mahadsan tahay ka qayb qaadashada warbaahin iyo aqoon si xor ah loo heli karo adduunka oo dhan.
mwe-upwiz-thanks-wikitext: Si aad faylka ugu isticmaasho wiki, nuqul ka samee qoraalkan oo geli bog:
mwe-upwiz-thanks-update-delay: Gelinta sawirka bogga liiska waxay qaadan kartaa ilaa shan daqiiqo.
mwe-upwiz-thanks-url: Si aad ugu xirto HTML, nuqul ka samee URL-kan:
mwe-upwiz-upload-error-bad-filename-exte: Wiki-kan ma aqbalo magacyada faylasha ee ku dhammaada kordhinta ".$1".
mwe-upwiz-upload-error-bad-filename-no-e: Wiki-kan wuxuu u baahan yahay in faylasha ay yeeshaan kordhin — sida ".JPG" oo ku dhammaata magaca faylka.
mwe-upwiz-upload-error-duplicate-filenam: Waxaad hore u soo gelisay faylka "$1".
mwe-upwiz-upload-error-duplicate: Faylkan hore ayaa loogu soo geliyay wiki-kan.
mwe-upwiz-upload-error-duplicate-archive: Faylkan hore ayaa loogu soo geliyay wiki-kan, balse markii dambe waa la tirtiray.
mwe-upwiz-fileexists-replace-on-page-v2: Cinwaankan hore ayaa loo isticmaalay. Fadlan dooro cinwaan gaar ah. Talo: ku dar taariikhda, bil, ama sanadka shaqada si aad uga dhigto mid gaar ah.
mwe-upwiz-fileexists-replace-no-link: Fadlan dooro cinwaan kale, sababtoo ah cinwaankan hore ayuu u isticmaalaa fayl kale.
mwe-upwiz-blacklisted-details-titleblack: Fadlan qor cinwaan faahfaahsan oo xog badan leh ([$2 eeg tusaalooyin]).

Tusaalooyin magacyo fayl oo wanaagsan:

  • Nodnol skyline from Nodnol City Hall - Aug 2022
  • 1875 Meeting of Settlers at Falconer Bay, New Nodland
  • Pseudohedron with no vertex visible from center

Tusaalooyin magacyo fayl oo xun:

  • Image01
  • Joe
  • DSC00001
  • Foo.svg.png
  • 30996951316264l
  • PSEUDOHEDRON WITH NO VERTEX VISIBLE FROM CENTER

[https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/MediaWiki:Titleblacklist-custom-filename Wax badan ka baro]
mwe-upwiz-blacklisted-details-feedback: Fadlan qor cinwaan kale oo faahfaahsan ([$2 macluumaad dheeraad ah]) • [$3 Soo dir ra’yi-celin]
mwe-upwiz-metadata-help-title: Ku darista xog dheeraad ah oo ikhtiyaari ah
mwe-upwiz-metadata-help-content: Hadda faylashaadu way soo geliyeen, ku darista xog dheeraad ah waxay ka caawinaysaa in ay dadka kale si fudud u helaan.
mwe-upwiz-tooltip-skiptutorial: Waxaad dib u shidi kartaa casharkan [$1 dookhyada isticmaalahaaga], hoosta $2 → $3.
mwe-upwiz-tooltip-author: Magaca qofka qaaday sawirka, ama rinjiyeeyay sawirka, ama sawiray, iwm.
mwe-upwiz-tooltip-source: Halkee uu ka yimid faylkan dijitaalka ah — waxa uu noqon karaa URL, ama buug ama daabacaad.
mwe-upwiz-tooltip-sign: Waxaad isticmaali kartaa magacaaga isticmaale ee wiki-ga ama magacaaga dhabta ah. Labada xaaladoodba, waxaa lagu xiriirin doonaa boggaaga isticmaale ee wiki-ga.
mwe-upwiz-tooltip-title: Samee cinwaan gaar ah oo sharaxaad leh adigoo isticmaalaya luqad fudud oo leh meelo bannaan. Ha ku darin kordhinta faylka, haddii ay jirto.
mwe-upwiz-tooltip-description: Waxaan kugula talineynaa inaad bixiso macluumaad faahfaahsan oo ku saabsan shaqadan haddii aad awooddo.
mwe-upwiz-tooltip-additional-info: Ku dar waxyaabaha soo socda si shaqadaada looga dhigo mid si fudud loo heli karo. Noqo mid aad u gaar ah intii suurtagal ah.
mwe-upwiz-tooltip-date: Dooro taariikhda shaqadan la sameeyay ama markii ugu horreysay la daabacay.
mwe-upwiz-tooltip-location: [$1 Ku samee geocode faylkaaga] si loo aqoonsado halka warbaahinta laga duubay (mar walba ma aha mid faa’iido leh in meel lagu daro nooc kasta oo warbaahin ah).
mwe-upwiz-deeds-need-deed: Fadlan sharax meesha aad ka heshay faylkan iyo sida boggan u isticmaali karo, adigoo dooranaya mid ka mid ah xulashooyinka.
mwe-upwiz-license-show-recommended: Isticmaal shatiga lagu taliyay ee boggan
mwe-upwiz-error-signature-blank: Waa inaad ku saxiixdaa magacaaga isticmaale ama magacaaga dhabta ah goobta ku habboon.
mwe-upwiz-error-latitude: Loolku waa inuu noqdaa tiro u dhexeysa -90 iyo 90.
mwe-upwiz-error-longitude: Dhererka waa inuu noqdaa tiro u dhexeysa -180 iyo 180.
mwe-upwiz-error-heading: Cinwaanku waa inuu noqdaa tiro u dhexeysa 0 iyo 360.
mwe-upwiz-error-signature-too-long:
Saxiixaagu waa aad u dheer.  
Fadlan ka dhig mid ka gaaban $1 {{PLURAL:$1|xaraf|xarfo}}.
mwe-upwiz-error-signature-too-short:
Saxiixaagu waa aad u gaaban.  
Fadlan ka dhig mid ka dheer $1 {{PLURAL:$1|xaraf|xarfo}}.
mwe-upwiz-error-date-blank: Taariikhda la sameeyay waa loo baahan yahay
mwe-upwiz-error-date-license-mismatch: Taariikhda aad dooratay kuma waafaqsana shatiga ($1).
mwe-upwiz-error-date-license-unlikely: Taariikhda aad dooratay waxay u badan tahay inaysan sax ahayn, marka la eego shatiga ($1).
mwe-upwiz-error-blank: Jawaabta su'aashan waa loo baahan yahay.
mwe-upwiz-error-question-blank: Jawaabta su'aashan waa loo baahan yahay.
mwe-upwiz-error-too-long:
Gelintan waa aad u dheer.  
Fadlan hubi in gelintu ugu badnaan tahay $1 {{PLURAL:$1|xaraf|xarfo}}.
mwe-upwiz-error-too-short:
Gelintan waa aad u gaaban.  
Fadlan hubi in gelintu ugu yaraan tahay $1 {{PLURAL:$1|xaraf|xarfo}}.
mwe-upwiz-error-title-too-long:
Cinwaankan waa aad u dheer.  
Fadlan hubi in cinwaanku ugu badnaan yahay $1 {{PLURAL:$1|bayt|baytyo}}.
mwe-upwiz-error-title-too-short:
Cinwaankan waa aad u gaaban.

mwe-upwiz-error-title-too-few-characters:
Cinwaankan waa aad u gaaban.  
Fadlan hubi in cinwaanku ugu yaraan yahay $1 {{PLURAL:$1|xaraf|xarfo}}.
mwe-upwiz-error-caption-blank: Qoraal sharaxaad waa loo baahan yahay
mwe-upwiz-error-title-blacklisted: Cinwaankan waxa ku jira qoraal aan la rabin. Fadlan dib u eeg oo sax.
mwe-upwiz-error-title-senselessimagename: Fadlan ka dhig cinwaankan mid macno badan leh.
mwe-upwiz-error-title-thumbnail: Tani waxay u muuqataa cinwaan sawir yar ah. Fadlan ha dib ugu soo gelin thumbnails isla wiki-ga. Haddii kale, sax magaca faylka si uu u noqdo mid macno leh, oo ka saar horgalaha sawirka yar.
mwe-upwiz-error-title-extension: Uma baahnid inaad ku darto kordhin fayl. Kaliya samee cinwaan ay dadka akhrin karaan, codsigu wuu daryeelayaa inta kale.
mwe-upwiz-error-title-protected: Cinwaankan wuxuu la mid yahay bog la ilaaliyay oo ku jira wiki-kan. Fadlan dooro mid kale.
mwe-upwiz-error-title-duplicate: Cinwaankan waxaa loo cayimay in ka badan hal fayl oo aad soo gelinayso. Hoos istaagyada waxaa loo tixgeliyaa sida meelo bannaan, kordhinta faylkana si otomaatig ah ayaa loo daraa.
mwe-upwiz-error-license-wikitext-too-sho: Wikitext-kan waa aad u gaaban si uu u noqdo shaati.
mwe-upwiz-error-license-wikitext-too-lon: Wikitext-ka aad gelisay waa aad u dheer.
mwe-upwiz-error-license-wikitext-missing: Wikitext-ka aad gelisay kuma jiro tusmada shati oo sax ah.
mwe-upwiz-error-pageprops-missing-page: Waa lagu guul darreystay in la helo sifooyinka bogga: boggu (wali) ma jiro.
mwe-upwiz-error-pageprops-missing-prop: Waa lagu guul darreystay in la helo sifooyinka bogga: sifada (wali) ma jirto.
mwe-upwiz-error-submit-structured-data: Sawirka si guul leh ayaa loo soo geliyay, laakiin wax baa qaldamay marka la gudbinayay qaar ka mid ah xogta dheeraadka ah.
mwe-upwiz-error-submit-structured-data-r: Si aad u saxdo tan, booqo [[$1]] si aad u cusboonaysiiso xogta halkaas.
mwe-upwiz-error-postdate: Taariikhda aad dooratay waxay ku jirtaa mustaqbalka. Fadlan dooro taariikh sax ah.
mwe-upwiz-warning-date-prefilled: Taariikhda kore waxaa laga soo qaatay faahfaahinta sawirkaaga.
mwe-upwiz-notice-date-imprecise: Waxaan kugula talineynaa inaad bixiso taariikh buuxda haddii ay la ogyahay.
mwe-upwiz-details-error-count: Waxaa jira {{PLURAL:$1|hal qalad|$1 qalad}} oo ku jira {{PLURAL:$2|foomka|foomamka}} kore. Sax {{PLURAL:$1|qaldkaas|qaldadkaas}}, kadibna isku day mar kale inaad gudbiso.
mwe-upwiz-details-warning-count: Waxaa jira {{PLURAL:$1|hal digniin|$1 digniino}} oo ku jira {{PLURAL:$2|foomka|foomamka}} kore. Waxaan kugula talineynaa inaad saxdo {{PLURAL:$1|khaladkaas|khaladaadkaas}} ka hor intaadan sii wadin.
mwe-upwiz-details-error-generic: Fadlan sax dhammaan khaladaadka ku jira foomka ka hor intaadan sii wadin.
mwe-upwiz-details-warning-generic: Fadlan sax dhammaan digniinaha ku jira foomka ka hor intaadan sii wadin.
mwe-upwiz-details-warning-scroll: U gudub digniinta ku jirta bogga
mwe-upwiz-too-many-files-text: Waxaad hal mar soo gelin kartaa kaliya $1 {{PLURAL:$1|fayl|faylal}} laakiin waxaad isku dayday inaad soo geliso $2 {{PLURAL:$2|fayl|faylal}} guud ahaan. Fadlan ku celi adigoo isticmaalaya faylal ka yar!
mwe-upwiz-file-too-large-text: Waxaad kaliya soo gelin kartaa faylal cabbirkoodu yahay ilaa $1. Waxaad isku dayday inaad soo geliso fayl cabbirkiisu yahay $2.
mwe-upwiz-file-too-large: Faylka aad buu u weyn yahay.
mwe-upwiz-dialog-warning: Waxaan kugula talineynaa inaad si sax ah u buuxiso dhammaan meelaha bannaan. Ma rabtaa inaad sii waddo adigoon saxin digniinahan?
mwe-upwiz-campaign-view-all-media: Eeg dhammaan warbaahinta la soo geliyay
mwe-upwiz-campaign-no-uploads-yet: Weli wax soo gelin ah ma jiraan!
mwe-upwiz-license-custom-explain: Waa in uu ka koobnaadaa [$2 calaamad xuquuqda daabacaadda oo sax ah] gudaha tusmada sax ah sida <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Cc-by-2.0<nowiki>}}</nowiki>
mwe-upwiz-license-custom-pd: Ku dar summad xuquuq dadweyne oo gaar ah, haddii ay khuseyso.
mwe-upwiz-license-custom-pd-explain: Waa in uu ka koobnaadaa summad sax ah oo xuquuq dadweyne [$2 calaamadda domainka dadweynaha] oo ku jirta tusmada sax ah sida <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Pd-old-70<nowiki>}}</nowiki>.
mwe-upwiz-license-own-pd-text: Dhammaan xuquuqaha waa laga tanaasulay iyadoo la adeegsanayo ruqsadda Creative Commons Zero (sida domain-ka dadweyne) $3
mwe-upwiz-license-pd-old-100: Qoraagu wuxuu dhintay in ka badan 100 sano ka hor
mwe-upwiz-license-pd-old: Qoraagu wuxuu dhintay in ka badan 70 sano ka hor
mwe-upwiz-license-pd-art-70: Nuqul daacad ah oo rinjiyeyn ku jirta domain-ka dadweyne sababtoo ah farshaxanku wuxuu dhintay in ka badan 70 sano ka hor ([$2 wax badan ka ogow])
mwe-upwiz-license-pd-us-generic: Waxaan meel internetka ka mid ah ka akhriyay in {{PLURAL:$1|kani uu yahay|kuwani ay yihiin}} domain-ka dadweyne gudaha Maraykanka
mwe-upwiz-license-pd-usgov: {{PLURAL:$1|Shaqo asal ah|Shaqooyin asal ah}} oo ay leedahay Dowladda Federaalka Maraykanka
mwe-upwiz-license-pd-usgov-nasa: {{PLURAL:$1|Shaqo asal ah|Shaqooyin asal ah}} oo ay leedahay NASA
mwe-upwiz-license-pd-usgov-military-navy: {{PLURAL:$1|Shaqo asal ah|Shaqooyin asal ah}} oo ay leedahay Ciidanka Badda Maraykanka
mwe-upwiz-license-pd-ineligible: Aad u fudud si xuquuqda daabacaaddu u ilaaliso
mwe-upwiz-license-pd-ineligible-help: Ka taxaddar arrintan. Sawirku waa inuu noqdaa mid aad u fudud, sida goobo cagaaran ama afar gees cas
mwe-upwiz-license-pd-textlogo: Astaanta ka kooban kaliya qoraal fudud
mwe-upwiz-license-copyrighted-free-use: Xuquuqda daabacaadda waa la hayaa, laakiin waxaa loo isticmaali karaa ujeeddo kasta, oo ay ku jirto ganacsi ahaan
mwe-upwiz-license-attribution: Waxaa loo isticmaali karaa ujeeddo kasta, oo ay ku jirto ganacsi ahaan, haddii si sax ah loo sheego qofka xuquuqda daabacaadda leh
mwe-upwiz-license-gfdl: Ruqsadda Dukumentiga Bilaashka ah ee GNU
mwe-upwiz-license-cc-by-sa-3.0-gfdl-text: Nuqul-bidix, waxaa loo baahan yahay sifeyn (GFDL, CC BY-SA 3.0) $3
mwe-upwiz-license-unsure: Ma hubo in {{PLURAL:$1|ay tahay|ay yihiin}} xuquuqda daabacaadda ee Mareykanka
mwe-upwiz-license-free-head: Abuuraha ayaa sii daayay ama daabacay {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}} iyadoo lagu sii daayay shati furan tusaale ahaan [https://creativecommons.org/share-your-work/cclicenses/ ruqsadda Creative Commons]
mwe-upwiz-license-free-subhead: Ma ogtahay shatiga uu abuuraha ku daabacay {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}}?
mwe-upwiz-license-cc0-head-extra: Tusaale: {{PLURAL:$1|shaqo duug ah|shaqooyin duug ah}} oo xuquuqdooda daabacaaddu ay dhammaatay ama {{PLURAL:$1|shaqo|shaqooyin}} ay dowladdu u sii daysay sida diiwaanno dadweyne, iwm. [$2 Wax badan ka baro]
mwe-upwiz-license-cc0-subhead-2: Kuwa hoos ku qoran kee baa sax ah? Dhammaan kuwa saxda ah calaamadee.
mwe-upwiz-license-cc0-subhead-extra: {{SITENAME}} waxay ku taal Maraykanka, sidaas darteed {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}} waa inay sidoo kale ka baxsan yihiin xuquuqda daabacaadda gudaha Mareykanka.
mwe-upwiz-license-vrt-head: Waxaan haystaa oggolaansho aan ku soo gelin karo {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}} oo ka yimid shaqo bixiyahayga ama abuuraha {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}}
mwe-upwiz-license-unknown-head: Ma hubo haddii {{PLURAL:$1|la wadaagi karo}} si xor ah
mwe-upwiz-license-other-head: Geli ruqsad kale oo ku qoran qaabka wikitext
mwe-upwiz-license-cc-head: Qoraaga xuquuqdiisu waa uu ku daabacay {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan|shaqooyinkan}} shatiga saxda ah ee Creative Commons
mwe-upwiz-license-cc-subhead: Dhammaan ruqsadaha Creative Commons kuma habboona goobtan. Hubi in qofka xuquuqda leh uu isticmaalay mid ka mid ah ruqsadahan.
mwe-upwiz-license-flickr-head: Qofka xuquuqda daabacaadda leh wuxuu ku daabacay {{PLURAL:$1|sawirkiisa ama muuqaalka|sawirradiisa ama muuqaalada}} Flickr isagoo wata ruqsadda saxda ah
mwe-upwiz-license-flickr-subhead: Eeg “Ruqsada” qaybta dhinaca ee bogga Flickr. Labadaba astaamaha iyo magaca ruqsadda ay isticmaaleen waa inay la mid noqdaan mid ka mid ah xulashooyinka halkan ku jira.
mwe-upwiz-license-public-domain-usa-head: Xuquuqda daabacaadda si cad ayay ugu dhammaatay gudaha Maraykanka
mwe-upwiz-license-public-domain-usa-subh: {{SITENAME}} waxay ku taallaa Maraykanka, sidaas darteed shaqadu waa inay ka baxsan tahay xuquuqda daabacaadda dalkaas.
mwe-upwiz-license-usgov-head: {{PLURAL:$1|Tani waa shaqo|Kuwani waa shaqooyin}} ay sameysay dowladda Maraykanka
mwe-upwiz-license-custom-head: Sabab kale oo aan kor lagu xusin
mwe-upwiz-license-none-head: Waxaan ka helay internet-ka — ma hubo
mwe-upwiz-license-none: Waxaan aaminsanahay in {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan ay|shaqooyinkan ay}} si xor ah loo ruqsadeeyay ama ay sharci ahaan ku jiraan domain-ka dadweynaha. Waxaan fahmayaa in haddii aanan si degdeg ah u gelin macluumaadka ruqsadda, {{PLURAL:$1|faylka|faylasha}} la tirtiri karo.
mwe-upwiz-license-vrt: Waxaan fahamsanahay in haddii iimayl aan la dirin 30 maalmood gudahood laga bilaabo {{PLURAL:$1|soo gelinta, faylkan|soo gelinta, faylashan}} la tirtiri doono.
mwe-upwiz-license-generic-head: {{PLURAL:$1|Shaqadan waa|Shaqooyinkan waa}} la aqbali karaa in lagu soo geliyo wiki-kan
mwe-upwiz-license-generic: Waxaan dib u eegay [[{{int:disclaimerpage}}|ka digista ee wiki-kan]] waxaanan sida ugu fiican ee aan ogahay {{PLURAL:$1|shaqadan ma aha|shaqooyinkan ma aha}} kuwo ku hoos jira heerar ilaalin xogeed oo ka sarreeya kuwa wiki-kan.
mwe-upwiz-license-external: Faylka waxa uu ku hoos jiraa ruqsadda soo socota ee ku taal goobta asalka ah "$1": $2.
mwe-upwiz-license-external-invalid:
Faylkan ku yaal $1 waxa uu ku hoos jiraa ruqsadda soo socota: $2.

Nasiib darro, wiki-kan ma aqbalo ruqsaddaas.
mwe-upwiz-license-photoset-invalid: Nasiib darro, sawir kasta oo ku jira xirmada sawirrada ma laha ruqsad ku habboon in lagu isticmaalo boggan.
mwe-upwiz-license-pd-old-70: Qoraagu wuxuu geeriyooday in ka badan 70 sano ka hor
mwe-upwiz-url-invalid: URL-ka la geliyay lama taageero ama wuxuu tilmaamayaa $1 sawir ama xirmo sawirro oo aan sax ahayn ama xaddidan, sidaas darteed lama isticmaali karo.
mwe-upwiz-user-blacklisted: Nasiib darro, sawirro ka yimid koontadan $1 laguma soo gelin karo goobtaan.
mwe-upwiz-categories-missing: {{PLURAL:$1|qaybta|qaybaha}} cas cas ku muuqda {{PLURAL:$1|ma jirto|ma jiraan}} bog sharaxaad leh. Haddii {{PLURAL:$1|qayb la mid ah ay jirto|qaybo la mid ah ay jiraan}}, waxaan kugula talineynaa inaad isticmaasho {{PLURAL:$1|taas|kuwaas}}. Haddii aysan jirin, fadlan ugu dub {{PLURAL:$1|bogga|bogaaga}} {{PLURAL:$1|qaybta cusub|qaybaha cusub}} oo ku dar sharaxaad.
mwe-upwiz-categories-placeholder: tusaale ahaan, Xayawaanka naasleyda ee Beerta Qaranka Etosha
mwe-upwiz-statements-title-depicts: Mawduucyada ugu muhiimsan ee ka muuqda shaqadan
mwe-upwiz-statements-too-many-items: Waxaan kugula talineynaa in tirada waxyaabaha la ilaaliyo lagu xaddido ugu badnaan $1
mwe-upwiz-thumbnail-failed: Soo gelintu way guulaysatay, laakiin server-ku ma helin sawir yar oo horudhac ah.
mwe-upwiz-error-title-invalid: Cinwaankan waa aan sax ahayn. Fadlan hubi inaad ka saarto xarfo sida biraha laba geesoodka, laba dhibcood, jarjar, calaamadaha isbarbardhigga, xariiq toosan, iyo garbaha qalloocan.
mwe-upwiz-subhead-alternatives: Habab kale oo lagu soo geliyo faylasha
mwe-upwiz-feedback-title: Soo gudbi ra’yi-celin ku saabsan UploadWizard
mwe-upwiz-feedback-blacklist-line-intro:
Tani waa gelinta liiska cinwaannada aan la oggolayn ee la mid noqotay:
$1
mwe-upwiz-feedback-blacklist-subject: Cinwaanka soo gelintayda, "$1" waa la mamnuucay.
mwe-upwiz-errordialog-title: Khalad ayaa ka dhacay soo gudbintaada
mwe-upwiz-additional-info-help: Ku dar kuwan soo socda si shaqadaada loo sii fududeeyo in la helo. Noqo mid aad u gaar ah intii suurtogal ah.
prefs-description-uploads: Deji magaca qoraagaaga iyo shatiga caadiga ah.
mwe-upwiz-prefs-def-license-def: Isticmaal waxa caadi ahaan loo dejiyay
mwe-upwiz-prefs-def-license-custom: Shaati caadi ah oo la habeeyay
mwe-upwiz-prefs-def-license-custom-help: Goobtan waxaa la isticmaalaa oo keliya haddii aad doorato ikhtiyaarka ugu dambeeya ee kor ku xusan.
mwe-upwiz-prefs-license-name-help: Haddii goobta la banneeyo, waxaa si toos ah loo isticmaalaa magaca isticmaalaha
mwe-upwiz-prefs-skiptutorial: Ka bood casharka hordhaca ah ee ruqsada
mwe-upwiz-prefs-maxsimultaneous-upload: Tirada ugu badan ee soo gelin isku mar ah
mwe-upwiz-mv-cta-heading: Ka caawi in sawirrada si fudud loo helo qof walba
mwe-upwiz-mv-cta-checkbox-label: Haa, waxaan jeclaan lahaa in la ii soo diro ogeysiisyo marka sawirrada aan soo geliyo ay helaan tags diyaar u ah in aan dib u eego
mwe-upwiz-mv-cta-final-cta: Ma diyaar baa inaad isla markiiba bilowdo calaamadaynta? [[c:Special:SuggestedTags|Isku day qalabka]] adigoo taggareynaya sawirrada caanka ah hadda!
mwe-upwiz-mv-cta-user-preference-set: Fiican! Waxaad beddeli kartaa dejintan wakhti kasta adigoo ka eegaya [[c:Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-echo|Dooqyadaada]].
mwe-upwiz-mv-cta-user-preference-unset: Mar dambe ma heli doontid ogeysiisyo laguugu sheego inaad calaamadda sawirrada aad soo geliso.
mwe-upwiz-mv-cta-user-preference-set-fai: Ma aanan awoodin in aan kaydiyo dooqyadaada waqtigan. Fadlan booqo [[c:Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-echo|Dooqyadaada]] si aad u shido ogeysiisyada.
mwe-upwiz-upload-comment-own-work: Soo geliyay shaqo aan anigu leeyahay anigoo adeegsanaya UploadWizard
mwe-upwiz-upload-comment-third-party: Soo geliyay shaqo uu sameeyay $1 oo ka timid $2 iyadoo la adeegsanayo UploadWizard
namespaceinfo-description-ns460: Meel magac loogu talagalay ololaha soo gelinta
namespaceinfo-description-ns461: Bogagga wadahadalka ee ololayaasha soo gelinta
